ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission - Due 5th May
ham.body:
Dear Students,

Hope you are all doing well. This is a friendly reminder that the final semester project reports and presentation decks are due on 5th May, 2024. Please submit your PDF files through the Course Portal (link: <URL>) before the deadline. Late submissions will incur a penalty of 10% as per the course policy.

If you need any clarification, feel free to email me or drop by the office hours on Wednesday.

Best regards,
Prof. R. Sharma
Department of Computer Science

spam.subject: URGENT: Scholarship Confirmation Required – Action Needed Within 48 Hours
spam.body:
Hello,

Congratulations! You have been selected for the prestigious National University Scholarship 2024. Your excellent scores and leadership skills have impressed our selection committee.

To secure the scholarship, you must submit the following documents within the next 48 hours:
- Scan of your latest transcript
- Bank account details
- Signed declaration form

Click here to upload your documents securely: <URL>

Please note that the scholarship disbursement will be processed only after verification. If you do not provide the required documents within the time frame, your application will be automatically cancelled.

Act now to avoid any delay.

Regards,
Dr. A. Mehta
Director, Scholarship Management
National University
